content_body: Cabin Rentals of Ga is by far the best rental company we have worked with, we rent cabins every Fall and this is our first time with CROG.... from the beginning of our property search to check out, it was so easy. Such a great company to work with! Creekside Bend..... a fabulous cabin on a beautiful part of Fightingtown Creek. The rain had the water rushing and the sound was so soothing.... the outdoor fireplace, the rain on the tin roof and the rushing creek.... it’s what dreams are made of!
title: This is What Dreams are Made Of!
